assertions.description: The skadis_clock PCB is 327mm × 95mm — a long display board holding 60 LEDs arranged as four 7-segment digit groups. The DFM analysis correctly flags this as a board_size violation: 327.0×95.0mm exceeds the 100×100mm threshold, resulting in a higher fabrication pricing tier at JLCPCB. dfm_tier is reported as 'standard' with violation_count=1.
